_doc: Entry 100. Price drifts flat (peak only 100.5, +0.5%) for 5 bars, never reaching protect_pct=3 and never hitting the 92 hard stop. With stale_flat_bars=5 the position is cut on the 5th bar (index 4) as opportunity-cost dead weight. With stale_flat_bars=0 (off) it simply holds. Used to assert the stale-flat timeout.
